impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a deterministic, fixture-only check before any live crawl or authenticated automation depends on normalized document link graph data.
summary: Add fixture-backed normalized document link graph validation for canonical URLs, content types, source-index references, and artifact privacy.
target_task: Task checkbox-50: Add deterministic validation for the normalized document link graph covering canonical URL matching, content-type classification, source-index references, and no private or live crawl artifacts.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
